headline: Will AI spark a 3-day workweek? Navan CEO explains
summary: Navan Co-founder and CEO Ariel Cohen shares with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi an optimistic vision of AI driving corporate efficiency and potentially ushering in a three-day workweek, which he believes will ultimately boost the demand for both leisure and business travel.

headline: Salesforce to buy AI agent platform Fin for about $3.6 billion
summary: Salesforce said on Monday it had ‌signed an agreement to buy ‌autonomous AI agent platform Fin for ​about $3.6 billion. The deal strengthens Salesforce's Agentforce platform, as technology firms compete to roll out usage-based ‌autonomous digital ⁠workers across enterprises. Following completion, Salesforce and Fin will ⁠expand options for deploying AI agents in customer service, ​allowing customers ​to incorporate ​them with existing ‌systems, the companies said.

content.title: Salesforce to buy AI agent platform Fin for about $3.6 billion
content.summary: Salesforce said on Monday it had ‌signed an agreement to buy ‌autonomous AI agent platform Fin for ​about $3.6 billion. The deal strengthens Salesforce's Agentforce platform, as technology firms compete to roll out usage-based ‌autonomous digital ⁠workers across enterprises. Following completion, Salesforce and Fin will ⁠expand options for deploying AI agents in customer service, ​allowing customers ​to incorporate ​them with existing ‌systems, the companies said.

headline: Salesforce Signs Definitive Agreement to Acquire Fin
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 15, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the global leader in CRM, today announced it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Fin, formerly Intercom, an industry-leading customer agent company. Under the terms of the agreement, Salesforce will acquire Fin for approximately $3.6 billion, subject to customary purchase price adjustments.

content.title: Salesforce Signs Definitive Agreement to Acquire Fin
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 15, 2026--Salesforce (NYSE: CRM), the global leader in CRM, today announced it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Fin, formerly Intercom, an industry-leading customer agent company. Under the terms of the agreement, Salesforce will acquire Fin for approximately $3.6 billion, subject to customary purchase price adjustments.

headline: Salesforce deepens AI automation push with $3.6 billion Fin buyout
summary: Salesforce on Monday said it will buy autonomous AI agent platform Fin for about $3.6 billion, ‌bolstering its Agentforce offering as the business software provider ‌deepens its focus on automation.  The acquisition marks Salesforce's latest bet to accelerate ​its AI transition amid a wider industry shift toward autonomous agents.  Salesforce has been reinventing itself as an AI-agent company through Agentforce, which more than tripled annual recurring revenue to $1.2 billion in the ‌first quarter.

content.title: Salesforce deepens AI automation push with $3.6 billion Fin buyout
content.summary: Salesforce on Monday said it will buy autonomous AI agent platform Fin for about $3.6 billion, ‌bolstering its Agentforce offering as the business software provider ‌deepens its focus on automation.  The acquisition marks Salesforce's latest bet to accelerate ​its AI transition amid a wider industry shift toward autonomous agents.  Salesforce has been reinventing itself as an AI-agent company through Agentforce, which more than tripled annual recurring revenue to $1.2 billion in the ‌first quarter.

headline: Salesforce to Buy AI Firm That Handles Customer Service
summary: Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI. Fin's flagship product, AI Agent, handles customer queries via chat, email, WhatsApp, text message, phone and Slack. Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst Anurag Rana joined Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Intelligence."

content.title: Salesforce to Buy AI Firm That Handles Customer Service
content.description:
Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI.
Fin's flagship product, AI Agent, handles customer queries via chat, email, WhatsApp, text message, phone and Slack. Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst Anurag Rana joined Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Intelligence."
content.summary: Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI. Fin's flagship product, AI Agent, handles customer queries via chat, email, WhatsApp, text message, phone and Slack. Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst Anurag Rana joined Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Intelligence."
